# 0669 ANN Benchmark Pipeline and Results

Date: 2026-03-05T18:56:26+07:00

Reference learned from: [erikbern/ann-benchmarks](https://github.com/erikbern/ann-benchmarks) and dataset table in README.

## Pipeline Implemented

1. Download HDF5 dataset to `.cache/vector-bench/hdf5/<dataset>.hdf5`.
2. Extract prepared benchmark subset via pure-Go HDF5 reader to `.cache/vector-bench/prepared/<dataset>/`:
- `train.f32`, `test.f32`, `neighbors.i32`, `meta.json`
- query rows are filtered so top-k neighbors are valid in sampled train subset
3. For each dataset x driver:
- optional compose `down -v`, `up -d`, readiness check
- index sampled train vectors
- search sampled test vectors
- compute recall@10 against provided ANN-Benchmarks ground truth
- collect p50/p95 latency and QPS

## Run Settings

- drivers: `qdrant,weaviate,milvus,chroma,elasticsearch,opensearch,meilisearch,typesense,pgvector,solr`
- sample-train: 2000
- sample-test: 50
- neighbor-k extracted: 100
- evaluated k: 10

## Reproduce

```bash
go run ./cmd/vector-bench \
  -datasets all \
  -drivers qdrant,weaviate,milvus,chroma,elasticsearch,opensearch,meilisearch,typesense,pgvector,solr \
  -download true \
  -sample-train 2000 -sample-test 50 -neighbor-k 100 -k 10 \
  -report spec/0669_ann_benchmark.md
```
